name: notes_frontmatter_read
description: Read the YAML frontmatter of a note. Returns key-value pairs without the --- delimiters.

path.description: Note path relative to the sandbox root

name: notes_frontmatter_edit
description: Set a YAML frontmatter key to a value. Adds the key if missing, updates if present. Creates a frontmatter block if the file has none.

path.description: Note path relative to the sandbox root

value.description: Value to set the key to (e.g. 'draft', '[research, ai]')

name: notes_frontmatter_delete
description: Remove a YAML frontmatter key from a note. No-op if the key does not exist.

path.description: Note path relative to the sandbox root
